attributes.action: 50%refund of road tax to users when council don’t  keep the roads in good repair
attributes.additional_details: The government should make it law for the local councils to keep the roads in good repair. ie the repairs to the potholes to be done with in 1week .
attributes.background: If the local council does not repair the pot holes everyone in that Council area should get a  minimum of 50% off their road tax. The pot holes are dangerous. it’s only a matter of time before we get a  fatality.

rejection.details:
We think these petitions, which are already open, are very similar to yours:

'Exempt motorists from paying road tax on roads of poor quality'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760636

'Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK.'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761

'Increase highway funding & ringfence fuel duty & road tax for road maintenance'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759471
